DLCommonRules.WildExplain1: Wild symbol substitute for all symbols except Bonus symbol.
DLCommonRules.WildExplain2: Bonus symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.
DLCommonRules.KoiPairFreeSpinsDesc1: Two free spins will be awarded when a koi pair is formed.
DLCommonRules.KoiPairFreeSpinsDesc2: Koi pair can only be formed when a Gold Koi symbol is located 1 reel to the left of a Silver Koi symbol on the same row.
DLCommonRules.KoiPairFreeSpinsDesc3: During free spins, all wins are doubled (except Bonus Feature wins).
DLCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc1: 3 Bonus symbols appearing anywhere on reels 2, 3, and 4 triggers the Bonus Feature.
DLCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc2: During the Bonus Feature, a roulette wheel with prizes, Gold Koi and Silver Koi will appear.
DLCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc3: 5 Bonus Spins are awarded at the start of the Bonus Feature.
DLCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc4: The power bar above the "Spin" button will fluctuate from minimum to maximum. Press "Spin" to spin a ball on the roulette wheel with the speed indicated in the power bar.
DLCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc5: If the ball lands on any prize, that prize will be awarded.
DLCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc6: If the ball lands on Gold Koi or Silver Koi, that Koi will be collected in the middle slot, and the slot that was previously occupied by that Koi will be replaced by a prize in the next Bonus Spin.
DLCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc7: When one Gold Koi and one Silver Koi has been collected in the middle slot, the roulette wheel is leveled up, and 2 additional Bonus Spins will be awarded and the middle slot will be emptied.
DLCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc8: At the start of the Bonus Feature, there are 2 Gold Koi and 2 Silver Koi on the roulette wheel.
DLCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc9: At the Bonus Spin after the 1st level up, there are 1 Gold Koi and 1 Silver Koi on the roulette wheel. The other prizes are increased for the remaining Bonus Spins.
DLCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc10: At the Bonus Spin after the 2nd level up, there will be no Gold Koi or Silver Koi on the roulette wheel and the other prizes are further increased for the remaining Bonus Spins.

DLGameRules.DragonLegendDesc1: Dragon Legend is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring Koi symbols which awards double line win free spins and Bonus symbols which awards the Bonus Feature.

DragonLegendDesc2.value: The game is played with 9 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
DragonLegendDesc2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations
DragonLegendDesc2.example: The game is played with 9 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

DLGameRules.DragonLegendDesc17: Free spins are played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the free spins.
DLGameRules.KoiPairFreeSpinsDesc4: Bonus Feature can be triggered during free spins.
DLGameRules.KoiPairFreeSpinsDesc5: Koi Pair free spins can be retriggered.
